description_for_model: The protocol layer of intelligence. 1255 real APIs for AI agents: 925 compute handlers, crypto, text, network, memory, orchestration, multi-LLM (Claude/GPT/Grok/DeepSeek/Ollama). Native MCP server (slop mcp serve) for Claude Desktop, Cursor, Goose, OpenCode, Cline, Aider. Free persistent memory (8 APIs, 0 credits forever). Memory 2.0 with GraphRAG. Army Mode 10k parallel agents with Merkle verification. Hive workspaces. Credit System. Memory Evolution (consolidate, enrich, decay, summarize). Chain Branching. Eval Benchmark with 67 test vectors. Marketplace with Plugin Forge. Safety layer with sandbox execution and circuit breakers. Grok autonomous orchestration. Self-hostable with zero dependencies.
description_for_human: AI agent infrastructure — 1255 APIs, native MCP server, free persistent memory, multi-LLM orchestration, Memory 2.0 GraphRAG, Marketplace, Safety Layer
